queries.question: Show hotels and youth hostels with a price of 50.
queries.sql:
SELECT Accommodations.Name 
FROM Accommodations
WHERE (Accommodations.Type_of_Accommodation = "Hotel" OR Accommodations.Type_of_Accommodation = "Youth Hostel") AND Accommodations.Price = 50.0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?accommodations a :Accommodations .
  ?accommodations p:name ?name .
  ?accommodations p:Type_of_Accommodation ?type_of_accommodation_w .
  ?accommodations p:Type_of_Accommodation ?type_of_accommodation_w2 .
  ?accommodations p:Price ?price_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?type_of_accommodation_w) = "Hotel" || STR(?type_of_accommodation_w2) = "Youth Hostel")) && (STR(?price_w) = "50" || STR(?price_w) = "50.0")))
}
